channel.title: ntfs-3g on Julian Xhokaxhiu's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in ntfs-3g on Julian Xhokaxhiu's Blog

item.title: Fix NTFS-3G boot message warning on OS X Lion/Mountain Lion
item.description: Hi, today i’m sharing with you a little know-how i got by myself regarding an annoying error that maybe you faced yourself when you tryed to install NTFS-3G over Mac OS X Lion 10.
